code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      in_token = false
    else
      if not in_token
        count = count + 1
        in_token = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut state = 0
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    state = state + 1
    if state == 3
      state = 0
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  let name = match state
  when 0
    "Red"
  when 1
    "Green"
  when _
    "Yellow"
  end
  println(name)
end
